name: CheckSmart
description_short: CheckSmart is a retail financial services store in Columbus, OH offering check cashing, money orders, wire transfers, and access to third-party short-term loans.
description_long:
CheckSmart is a brick-and-mortar financial services retailer with multiple Ohio locations, including this Columbus store at 2496 Morse Rd on the northeast corner of Morse Rd and Cleveland Ave. The company operates as a neighborhood financial services center targeting consumers who need access to financial products outside of traditional banking, with a network of stores across Columbus and surrounding communities including Heath, Marion, Marysville, Reynoldsburg, Springfield, and Whitehall.

The store offers a broad range of in-person services: check cashing, money orders, wire transfers, and bill payment form the core of their financial services suite. Beyond that, customers can obtain a Green Dot Visa Debit Card in-store, exchange unused gift cards for cash, and access short-term loans through an unaffiliated third-party lender. CheckSmart emphasizes in-person customer service and allows customers to schedule appointments online before visiting to speed up the process.

What distinguishes CheckSmart from a pure check cashing outlet is its role as a loan facilitation point. Importantly, CheckSmart does not lend directly — it connects Ohio consumers to third-party loan products from an unaffiliated lender. The store assists with the application process in-person, and the company states that lending decisions are rendered quickly. Store hours are notably extended compared to banks: open until 8 PM on Fridays, with Saturday and Sunday hours as well, giving customers flexibility outside of normal business hours.

CheckSmart is an honest option for consumers who are unbanked or underbanked and need financial services in person. However, the third-party lending model is a significant caveat: loan terms, fees, and APRs are determined by an external lender, not CheckSmart, and no rate information is disclosed on the store page. Short-term lending products of this nature — accessible with only an ID, proof of income, and a phone number — typically carry high costs. Consumers who qualify for credit union payday alternative loans or personal loans should compare options before visiting.
pros: Multiple financial services in one location: check cashing, money orders, wire transfers, bill pay, and loan access
Extended Friday hours (8 AM–8 PM) and open on Sundays (11 AM–5 PM)
Green Dot Visa Debit Card available in-store for unbanked customers
Gift card exchange for cash — converts unused gift cards to spendable funds
Online appointment scheduling to reduce wait time in store
Multiple Columbus-area locations for geographic convenience
Clear checklist of required documents (ID, income proof, phone, email, address) provided upfront
cons: Loans are third-party products: CheckSmart is a broker, not a lender — rates and terms are set by an unnamed unaffiliated lender with no rates disclosed on the page
No online loan application — in-person visit required for all loan products
Short-term loans of this type typically carry high APRs not disclosed on the store page
Reduced weekend hours (Saturday closes at 4 PM, Sunday at 5 PM) may limit access
No product-specific details (loan amounts, fees, turnaround times) available on the store page
best_for: Unbanked or underbanked consumers needing check cashing and money services without a bank account
Consumers who want in-person help applying for a short-term loan and prefer face-to-face service
People needing same-day wire transfers, bill payments, or money orders outside of bank hours
Customers who want to exchange unused gift cards for cash
diagnosis: CheckSmart is best suited for unbanked or underbanked consumers who need check cashing, money orders, wire transfers, or help navigating a short-term loan application in person. The key caveat is that all loan products are sourced from an unnamed third-party lender — CheckSmart is a facilitator, not a lender — so borrowers should request full rate disclosures before committing to any loan product.
services: Green Dot Visa Debit Card issuance
